hero.title:
From Peru's fields
to the world
hero.subtitle:
Export-grade legumes and agricultural products

about.title: Connecting Peru's agricultural richness with the world
about.description: Business Beans Perú was founded with the mission of bringing the best of Peruvian agriculture to national and international markets. We specialize in the selection, processing, and export of high-quality legumes, operating under the strictest food safety standards.
features: FDA, SENASA, and HACCP certified processes
Full traceability from field to destination

products.title: Peruvian export-grade legumes
products.subtitle: Selected under the highest quality standards for demanding markets

certifications.title: Certified to export to the world

fda.name: FDA
fda.description: Food and Drug Administration — Authorization to export to the United States

senasa.name: SENASA
senasa.description: National Agricultural Health Service — Peruvian phytosanitary certification

haccp.name: HACCP
haccp.description: Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points — Guaranteed food safety

finalCta.title: Ready to import Peruvian quality?
finalCta.subtitle: Contact us today and receive detailed information about our products, certifications, and export terms.

hero.title:
We bring Peru's finest
agriculture to the world
hero.subtitle: We are a Peruvian company committed to quality, sustainability, and the development of the national agro-export sector.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To establish ourselves as a leading company in the trade and export of Peruvian legumes and agricultural products, with presence in key international markets, distinguished by product quality, process innovation, and sustainability commitment.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: To connect Peru's agricultural wealth with national and international markets, offering high-quality legumes and agro-industrial products that meet standards of trust, efficiency, and sustainability, strengthening solid commercial relationships and generating value for clients, producers, and strategic allies.

quality.name: Quality
quality.description: We select only the finest grains under strict quality control protocols at every stage of the process.

trust.name: Trust
trust.description: We build lasting commercial relationships based on transparency, compliance, and honesty.

sustainability.name: Sustainability
sustainability.description: We work with responsible producers and promote agricultural practices that care for the environment.

innovation.name: Innovation
innovation.description: We incorporate advanced selection technology to ensure product uniformity, cleanliness, and traceability.

efficiency.name: Efficiency
efficiency.description: We optimize every process from selection to shipment to meet international deadlines and standards.

commitment.name: Commitment
commitment.description: We are committed to our clients' success and the development of Peruvian agriculture.

selection.name: Selection
selection.description: We identify and evaluate the best agricultural lots in the country, working directly with certified producers.

processing.name: Processing
processing.description: We process the grain with state-of-the-art sorting machinery, removing imperfections and ensuring uniform calibers.

certification.name: Certification
certification.description: We verify compliance with all phytosanitary and food safety standards: FDA, SENASA, HACCP.

export.name: Export
export.description: We manage complete international logistics: documentation, traceability, and shipment to destination markets.

commitment.quote: We believe quality is not a destination, but the starting point of every shipment that leaves Peru for the world.

hero.title:
Peruvian legumes
for the world
hero.subtitle: Exportable products with international certification, guaranteed seasonal availability, and precise tariff headings.

frijol-canario.name: Canary Bean
frijol-canario.shortDescription: Large grain, intense yellow color. Ideal for Latin American and European markets.
frijol-canario.description: Canary Bean is one of Peru's flagship export grains. With its intense yellow color and smooth texture, it stands out for its high protein value and culinary versatility. Graded and classified by caliber to meet the standards of the most demanding international importers.

pallar-baby.name: Baby Lima Bean
pallar-baby.shortDescription: Soft and creamy legume. High demand in Asia and Europe.
pallar-baby.description: Baby Lima Bean is one of the most valued legumes in Asian and European markets. With its creamy texture and delicate flavor, it is ideal for high-end gastronomy and industrial processing. Peru is one of the world's leading producers of this variety.

lenteja-verde.name: Green Lentil
lenteja-verde.shortDescription: High protein content. Excellent hydration rate for industrial processing.
lenteja-verde.description: Peruvian Green Lentil is characterized by its high protein content, excellent hydration rate, and caliber uniformity. Widely used in the food industry for processing and packaging.

frijol-castilla.name: Black-eyed Pea
frijol-castilla.shortDescription: Traditional from the Peruvian coast. Superior nutritional profile for organic market.
frijol-castilla.description: Traditional to the Peruvian coast, the Black-eyed Pea is recognized for its superior nutritional profile and culinary versatility. Available in conventional and certified organic varieties.

garbanzo.name: Chickpea
garbanzo.shortDescription: Uniform calibers meeting Middle Eastern and European importer requirements.
garbanzo.description: Peruvian Chickpea is sold in 8–9 mm and 9–10 mm calibers, meeting the requirements of Mediterranean and Middle Eastern markets. Rigorous cleaning process guarantees minimal impurities.

maiz-gigante-cusco.name: Giant Cusco Corn
maiz-gigante-cusco.shortDescription: Peruvian flagship product. Growing demand in premium markets and foodservice.
maiz-gigante-cusco.description: Giant Cusco Corn is a world-unique product originating from Peru's Andean valleys. With exceptionally large kernels and distinctive flavor, it is in high demand in gourmet and international premium snack markets.

catalog.title: Looking for detailed technical specifications?
catalog.subtitle: Download our complete export catalog in PDF with technical sheets, certifications, and commercial terms.

hero.title:
Our products reach
15+ countries
hero.subtitle: From Lima, we connect Peruvian production with importers and distributors worldwide.

regions.title: A trade network present across four continents

institutional.title: Aligned with Peru's export promotion
institutional.description: Business Beans Perú operates in alignment with the export promotion objectives driven by PROMPERÚ and MINCETUR, contributing to increasing the international visibility of Peru's exports and strengthening agro-export sector competitiveness.

testimonials.title: Our clients' trust is our greatest reference

items.text: Business Beans has supplied us with excellent quality Canary Beans for three consecutive seasons. The consistency in grain caliber and cleanliness is remarkable.
items.name: Importadora del Sur

items.text: Export documentation always arrives complete and on time. The logistics process with Business Beans is efficient and seamless.
items.name: Pacific Trade Co.

items.text: The Giant Cusco Corn we import from Business Beans is the highest-turnover product in our gourmet line. Unmatched Peruvian quality.
items.name: Gourmet Imports USA

general.title: 1. General provisions
general.content: These Terms and Conditions govern access to and use of the Business Beans Perú SRL website. By accessing this site, you agree to be bound by these terms.

services.title: 2. Description of services
services.content: Business Beans Perú SRL is an agro-export company that provides information about its products and export services through this website. This site has an informational and B2B commercial nature.

ip.title: 3. Intellectual property
ip.content: All content on this website, including texts, images, logos and designs, is the property of Business Beans Perú SRL and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws.

privacy.title: 4. Privacy policy
privacy.content: Personal data collected through the forms on this site will be processed in accordance with Law No. 29733, Peru's Personal Data Protection Law, and will be used exclusively to respond to your inquiries.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of liability
liability.content: Business Beans Perú SRL is not responsible for damages arising from the use of information contained on this site. The information presented is for reference purposes and may be subject to change.

law.title: 6. Applicable law
law.content: These terms are governed by Peruvian law. Any dispute will be submitted to the competent courts of the city of Lima, Peru.

contact.title: 7. Contact
contact.content: For any questions about these Terms and Conditions, you may contact us at: info@businessbeans.com
